packageRules.description: Group all non-major updates into one weekly PR
Group all major updates into one monthly PR
schedule: before 6am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: Security patches get immediate PRs, auto-merge
First-party crates (David's own). Stricter pre-release gate than the 3-day window protects against; bypass so cmdr pulls fixes immediately.
rand_core stays 0.6.x: the test-only keygen must match ed25519-dalek 2.x's rand_core API, and the `getrandom` feature is gone in later versions, so a bump can't resolve.
The SMB benchmark harness pins sspi and smb-rpc in lockstep with smb 0.11's internal pins; independent bumps can never resolve, so leave the whole harness alone.
